hooks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "`$_ackDir = (Join-Path `$HOME '.agent-orchestra'); `$_ackFile = (Join-Path `$_ackDir 'copilot-sunset-ack'); if (-not (Test-Path `$_ackFile)) { try { if (-not (Test-Path `$_ackDir)) { [void](New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force `$_ackDir) }; [void](New-Item -ItemType File -Force `$_ackFile) } catch {}; Write-Warning 'Agent Orchestra: GitHub Copilot/VS Code support is frozen and retiring after 2026-08-31. Claude Code is the supported path. See https://github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra/discussions to reach out before the deadline.' }; `$productDirs = @('Code', 'Code - Insiders', 'VSCodium', 'Cursor'); `$pluginSuffix = 'agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra'; `$paths = @(); if (`$env:APPDATA) { foreach (`$productDir in `$productDirs) { `$paths += (Join-Path `$env:APPDATA (Join-Path `$productDir `$pluginSuffix)) } }; if (`$env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME) { foreach (`$productDir in `$productDirs) { `$paths += (Join-Path `$env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME (Join-Path `$productDir `$pluginSuffix)) } }; if (`$HOME) { foreach (`$productDir in `$productDirs) { `$paths += (Join-Path `$HOME (Join-Path '.config' (Join-Path `$productDir `$pluginSuffix))); `$paths += (Join-Path `$HOME (Join-Path 'Library/Application Support' (Join-Path `$productDir `$pluginSuffix))) } }; `$pluginRoot = `$paths | Where-Object { Test-Path `$_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if (`$pluginRoot) { & (Join-Path `$pluginRoot 'skills/session-startup/scripts/session-cleanup-detector.ps1') }"

pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "`$productDirs = @('Code', 'Code - Insiders', 'VSCodium', 'Cursor'); `$pluginSuffix = 'agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra'; `$paths = @(); if (`$env:APPDATA) { foreach (`$productDir in `$productDirs) { `$paths += (Join-Path `$env:APPDATA (Join-Path `$productDir `$pluginSuffix)) } }; if (`$env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME) { foreach (`$productDir in `$productDirs) { `$paths += (Join-Path `$env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME (Join-Path `$productDir `$pluginSuffix)) } }; if (`$HOME) { foreach (`$productDir in `$productDirs) { `$paths += (Join-Path `$HOME (Join-Path '.config' (Join-Path `$productDir `$pluginSuffix))); `$paths += (Join-Path `$HOME (Join-Path 'Library/Application Support' (Join-Path `$productDir `$pluginSuffix))) } }; `$pluginRoot = `$paths | Where-Object { Test-Path `$_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if (`$pluginRoot) { & (Join-Path `$pluginRoot 'skills/plugin-release-hygiene/scripts/plugin-release-hygiene-hook.ps1') }"

pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "`$productDirs = @('Code', 'Code - Insiders', 'VSCodium', 'Cursor'); `$pluginSuffix = 'agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra'; `$paths = @(); if (`$env:APPDATA) { foreach (`$productDir in `$productDirs) { `$paths += (Join-Path `$env:APPDATA (Join-Path `$productDir `$pluginSuffix)) } }; if (`$env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME) { foreach (`$productDir in `$productDirs) { `$paths += (Join-Path `$env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME (Join-Path `$productDir `$pluginSuffix)) } }; if (`$HOME) { foreach (`$productDir in `$productDirs) { `$paths += (Join-Path `$HOME (Join-Path '.config' (Join-Path `$productDir `$pluginSuffix))); `$paths += (Join-Path `$HOME (Join-Path 'Library/Application Support' (Join-Path `$productDir `$pluginSuffix))) } }; `$pluginRoot = `$paths | Where-Object { Test-Path `$_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if (`$pluginRoot) { & (Join-Path `$pluginRoot 'skills/solution-authoring/scripts/gate-event-logger-hook.ps1') }"
